mnemonics: PANDAS: Prepare, Analyze, and Describe Data with Series
keyPoints: Understand how to create and manipulate Pandas Series objects
Know how to perform indexing and selection operations on Series
Be able to apply common mathematical operations and methods to Series data
commonMistakes: Confusing Series with lists or arrays and trying to use list methods instead of Pandas methods
Forgetting that Series operations are index-aligned rather than position-aligned
Misusing boolean indexing syntax when filtering Series data
